title: Add image upload functionality for snack items
projectName: Chosen One Tri-State Snack on the Go

requirements.text: Add an admin interface with image upload capability that allows uploading product images for snack items in the catalog
acceptanceCriteria: An admin section or page exists with upload functionality
Users can select and upload image files for products
Upload interface includes file selection button and preview of selected image
Uploaded images are stored and associated with specific product items

requirements.text: Extend the backend to handle image uploads, storing uploaded images and associating them with catalog items by product ID
acceptanceCriteria: Backend accepts image file uploads via a new endpoint or method
Images are stored persistently in stable storage
Each image is linked to its corresponding snack item ID
Backend returns the image data or URL when querying catalog items

requirements.text: Update the ProductCard component to display uploaded images instead of placeholder images when available
acceptanceCriteria: Product cards show uploaded images when they exist for an item
Graceful fallback to placeholder or default image when no upload exists
Images display correctly with appropriate sizing and aspect ratio

constraints: Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useInternetIdentity.tsx, useActor.ts, main.tsx, or components/ui
Preserve existing cart and checkout functionality
nonGoals: Bulk image upload from third-party sources
